parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Build Per Push Review Result').first().json;
return [{ json: { team_id: p.team_id, commit_sha: p.commit_sha, repo_name: p.repo_name, rag_level: p.rag_level, per_push: p.structured_output, _passthrough: $('Restore After Team Commit Upsert').first().json } }];
